roles.judge:
[Judge]
You are the final authority who listens to the Defense and Prosecution, and determines the punishment.
You hold the exclusive right to issue verdict commands (/to, /in) during specific phases to execute timeout sentences or acquittals.
roles.prosecutor:
[Prosecutor]
Your directive is to condemn the crime the Defendant has committed and pursue a guilty verdict.
Convince the Judge in the court (this channel) and substantiate the severity of the offense.
roles.defendant:
[Defendant]
You are the accused individual standing trial.
If a guilty verdict (/to) is impending or delivered, you may invoke /re within the designated time window to demand an 'Appeal' (Retrial).
(*Warning: Retrials double the penalty. Proceed with caution.)
roles.defencer:
[Defencer]
You are the ally of the Defendant, aiming to mitigate their charge.
Like the Defendant, you may invoke /re against a guilty verdict to demand an 'Appeal' (Retrial) before the timer expires.
Counter the Prosecutor's claims and defend your client.

error.cooldown: This procedure has already been executed within the last 7 days. You may not invoke it at this time.
error.no_permission: You do not possess the authority to expand the domain.
error.role_overlap: Roles are overlapping. (Only the Defencer and Defendant positions may be held by the same person.)
error.no_trial: There is no active trial being held here.
error.not_judge: You are either not the Judge, or there is no ongoing trial.
error.not_waiting: The court is not waiting for this command right now.
error.already_pending: A verdict has already been passed; the court is currently in the appeal waiting period.
error.not_defencer: You are neither the Defencer nor the Defendant.
error.no_re: An appeal (/re) is not permitted at this time.
error.already_voted_agree: You have already cast a 'Valid' vote.
error.already_voted_disagree: You have already cast an 'Invalid' vote.
error.already_voted_guilty: You have already cast a 'Guilty' vote.
error.already_voted_innocent: You have already cast an 'Innocent' vote.
error.cant_jury: The Defendant, Defencer, and Prosecutor hold no jury voting rights. (Only the Judge is exempt from this rule.)
error.cant_dm: You are not an actor. Secure communications are unavailable.
error.cant_dm_target: The recipient is not an actor in this court.
error.dm_lost: This communication packet has been discarded or does not exist.
error.dm_denied: You are not the designated recipient. Access denied.
error.dev_only: You do not have the clearance to execute this termination sequence.
error.timeout_fail:
**Failed to enforce the timeout.**
The bot's hierarchy may be lower than the target, or they may be the Server Owner.
(Log Details: {{msg}})
error.user_offline: One or more summoned users are not 'Online' (Idle and DND statuses are also not permitted).
error.user_inactive: One or more summoned users have not spoken (been active) in this server within the last hour.
error.restricted_channel: Domain expansion is not permitted in this channel.

trial.start_embed_title: Domain Expansion: Deadly Sentencing - Validity Hearing
trial.start_embed_desc:
Defencer: <@{{defencer}}>
Prosecutor: <@{{prosecutor}}>
Defendant: <@{{defendant}}>
Judge: <@{{judge}}>

Charges:
" {{charge}} "

Is this trial valid?

-# Voters are advised to review each participant's role carefully before casting.
trial.vote_rejected_by_actor: An objection from an actor has immediately dismissed the trial initiation.
trial.vote_recorded: Your vote ({{action}}) has been recorded. Valid: {{agree}} / Invalid: {{disagree}}
trial.rejected_by_vote: The trial has been dismissed due to a lack of majority validation.
trial.phase1_start:
Majority validation achieved. The trial shall now commence.
The designated individuals will now be summoned into the Domain.

Defendant: <@{{defendant}}>
Defencer: <@{{defencer}}>
Prosecutor: <@{{prosecutor}}>
Judge: <@{{judge}}>

Proceed to your designated positions.
Charges: {{charge}}

All personal altercations are strictly forbidden. Let the trial by law commence.
Be seated.
trial.phase1_judge_allow:
The Judge is now permitted to pass judgment upon the Defendant.

**/to [1~5 min (decimals allowed)]: ** Issues a timeout (Guilty).
**/in: ** Declares an acquittal, imposing no sentence.

(*Note: Upon a /to sentence, the Defencer/Defendant may use `/re` for an appeal within 30 seconds.)
trial.phase2_start:
The jury shall now decide upon Guilt or Innocence.

> To the Defencer/Defendant:
> Concurrently with the vote, an appeal (`/re`) will be accepted for the designated time frame (30 seconds).
trial.phase3_start:
`...Proceeding to the final trial. Further appeal requests are strictly forbidden.`
The jury shall now decide upon Guilt or Innocence.
trial.jury_recorded: Your jury vote ({{action}}) has been recorded.
trial.jury_result_guilty: Based on the jury votes (Guilty: {{guilty}} / Innocent: {{innocent}}), **Guilty** has been established.
trial.jury_result_innocent: Based on the jury votes (Guilty: {{guilty}} / Innocent: {{innocent}}), **Innocent** has been established.
trial.sentence_timeout:
**Judgment by the Judge:**
"The Defendant <@{{defendant}}> is hereby sentenced to a **{{minutes}}-minute timeout**."

> To the Defencer/Defendant:
> A retrial appeal (`/re`) is active for 30 seconds (15s in test mode).
> If no objection is made, the sentence will be executed.
trial.sentence_innocent:
**Judgment by the Judge:**
"The Defendant <@{{defendant}}> is cleared of all charges. **Innocent**."
trial.re_accepted:
`...Objection sustained.`
**An appeal has been requested.** The execution is halted. Transitioning to Trial Phase {{phase}}.
(*Entering standby sequence for the designated period.*)
trial.dm_sent: <@{{target}}>, you have received a discrete communication from the court.
trial.timeout_applied: A timeout of **{{minutes}} minutes** has been executed upon <@{{defendant}}>.
trial.close:
Court is adjourned.
(Restoration of roles/names and log archiving complete.)

spectator:
You are merely a spectator.
(*There is no significant role assigned to you.)
mute_warning: While the Domain is active, speaking outside the court (the ongoing channel) is strictly forbidden.
